betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Automatic Crafting Table§f

§aA powered machine that crafts items automatically — set a recipe and feed it ingredients!§f

§bThe Automatic Crafting Table§f (ACT) is a powered machine that crafts items automatically. Place ingredients into the blue crafting grid to set the recipe. When items are input via funnels or automation, they go into the gray crafting grid and are consumed, with the product appearing in the gray output slot.

§6Specifications§f:
§b• Power§f: §e100 HE§f per operation
§b• Speed§f: §e1 operation per tick§f (20/s)
§b• Recipe Setup§f: Place ingredients in blue grid to define the pattern

§6Tip§f: For 3×3 or 2×2 recipes using all the same item (like 9 powders → 1 ingot), the §bCombinator Funnel§f is a cheaper unpowered alternative. Use the ACT for complex recipes with different ingredients!
